name: Explained
overview: Vox's short-form documentary series tackles topics in science, culture, world events, and society, distilling complex subjects into engaging 15–20 minute episodes.

name: Abstract: The Art of Design
overview: A Netflix documentary series that profiles the world's most innovative designers across a variety of disciplines, exploring how design shapes every aspect of our lives.

name: Frontline
overview: PBS's flagship investigative documentary journalism series, producing in-depth reports on the major issues of the time — public health, justice, foreign policy, and more.
